privileged_info_summary: The task requires opening a real VitalDB case file ('0001.vital') using Vital Recorder. Analysis confirms the data is non-synthetic and originates from a noncardiac surgery (Colorectal/Rectal cancer, low anterior resection). The exact duration of the recording is 11,542 seconds (3 hours, 12 minutes, 22 seconds), perfectly matching the prompt's 'approximately 3 hours 12 minutes' claim. All physiological data tracks mentioned in the prompt (including ART, ECG_II, ECG_V5, PLETH, CO2, AWP, INSP_SEVO, and EXP_SEVO) are confirmed to be present in the vital file.
